intake.user_request: Extend populate tool to generate CodeRef-Semantics headers in source files and sync with unified-registry.json. Implement AST-based exports/used_by extraction, LLM-enriched rules/related generation, and refresh command for ongoing syncs.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Multi-phase feature touching semantic enrichment layer + scanner integration + public API sync. Requires discovery + validation gates.

discovery.summary: Phased integration affecting 4 core modules and 2 consumers

in_scope: CodeRef-Semantics header generation in source files

constraints: Must integrate with existing populate-coderef CLI
AST parsing must use existing babel/typescript parsers
